\tzpentry{ID4706}{Magnetic Helicity Evolution Evolution Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4706 introduces Magnetic Helicity Evolution Evolution Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\\frac{d\\mathcal{H}_M}{dt} = -2\\eta \\int_V |\\mathbf{B}|^2 d^3x + 2\\int_{\\partial V} (\\mathbf{E} \\times \\mathbf{A}) \\cdot \\hat{\\mathbf{n}} \\, dS\n\\end{equation}
